description: Tests whether reading 3-letter Hebrew roots as dynamic sequences (letter dynamics composed across positions) produces meaningful glosses
methodology: Each root read as R1(initiates) → R2(mediates) → R3(completes) using corrected letter dynamics. LLM judges alignment between dynamic reading and actual meaning.

results.meaning: YHWH (proper name of God); to be, exist
results.dynamic_reading: Agency initiates → Revelation mediates → Conjunction completes: purposeful action brings existence into visible, ongoing connection
results.insight: Illuminates YHWH as the divine hand (י) breathing presence (ה) into eternal linkage (ו), revealing why this root names the self-existent, relational God
results.dynamic_gloss: Agency (acting with purpose, the hand that reaches) → Revelation (making visible, pointing to, breathing into presence) → Conjunction (joining, binding, linking, continuing)
